bundles.title: Extend status update types with coercion metadata
bundles.goal: Introduce TaskStatusCoercion type and extend StatusUpdateResult so callers can audit child-task coercions.

tasks.title: Add TaskStatusCoercion interface (bundleId, taskId, from, to) in status.ts
Extend StatusUpdateResult with readonly coercions: readonly TaskStatusCoercion[]
Re-export TaskStatusCoercion from src/lib/task-planner/index.ts

bundles.title: Normalize child task statuses inside updateBundleStatus
bundles.goal: Coerce child task statuses to the terminal bundle status on done/skipped transitions while preserving purity and immutability.

tasks.title: Detect terminal target status ('done' | 'skipped') inside updateBundleStatus
Rebuild bundle.tasks immutably with each task.status set to target terminal value
Collect one TaskStatusCoercion entry per child whose status actually changed
Return empty coercions array for non-terminal transitions and for empty-bundle cases
Force-coerce conflicting prior terminal child statuses (e.g. done → skipped) and emit coercion entries
Ensure input TaskGraph is never mutated and bundles array is rebuilt immutably

bundles.title: Unit tests for status normalization and coercion reporting
bundles.goal: Cover terminal transitions, non-terminal transitions, empty bundles, conflicting prior terminal states, and immutability guarantees.

tasks.title: Test: bundle → done coerces all pending children to done and reports coercions
Test: bundle → skipped coerces all pending children to skipped and reports coercions
Test: no-op children (already matching target) produce no coercion entries
Test: non-terminal transition returns empty coercions and leaves task statuses untouched
Test: empty-bundle terminal transition updates bundle status and returns empty coercions
Test: conflicting prior terminal child (done when bundle → skipped) is force-coerced and logged
Test: input TaskGraph reference and nested arrays are not mutated
Test: rejected transitions (e.g. done → pending) still return ok:false with no coercions

bundles.title: Renderer consistency tests after normalization
bundles.goal: Verify renderTasksMd produces a tasks.md whose checkboxes match the bundle header after a terminal transition.

tasks.title: Test: after bundle → done, rendered tasks.md shows checked boxes under the done header
Test: after bundle → skipped, rendered tasks.md reflects skipped state consistently
Confirm renderTasksMd remains unchanged (no special-casing added)

bundles.title: Wire coercions through the apply-phase caller
bundles.goal: Persist the normalized graph, re-render tasks.md atomically, and emit one structured log per coercion.
outputs: apply-phase caller updated to consume result.coercions
atomic write sequence for task-graph.json and tasks.md
structured audit log lines per coercion

tasks.title: Invoke updateBundleStatus and branch on result.ok in the apply-phase caller
Persist result.taskGraph to task-graph.json using existing atomic write-temp+rename pattern
Render tasks.md via renderTasksMd(result.taskGraph) and write atomically
Emit one structured log line per TaskStatusCoercion with bundle_id, task_id, from_status, to_status
Ensure no log is emitted when coercions is empty (no-op silence)

bundles.title: Integration tests for apply-phase persistence and logging
bundles.goal: Assert end-to-end that a terminal bundle transition persists a consistent graph, re-renders tasks.md, and logs exactly one line per coercion.
outputs: integration tests covering persistence + render + logging

tasks.title: Test: apply-phase terminal transition writes consistent task-graph.json (bundle + children match)
Test: apply-phase terminal transition writes tasks.md whose checkboxes match bundle header
Test: exactly one audit log line is emitted per coercion entry
Test: no audit log lines on non-terminal transitions or when all children already matched
Test: atomic write pattern is used for both task-graph.json and tasks.md

bundles.title: Repository verification and release note
bundles.goal: Run formatting, linting, type checking, tests, and build; document the additive API change.
outputs: release note entry describing additive StatusUpdateResult.coercions field

tasks.title: Run repository-defined format, lint, type-check, test, and build commands for affected scope
Fix any failures surfaced by verification steps
Add release note describing additive StatusUpdateResult.coercions and new TaskStatusCoercion export
